title: Khiladi
subTitle: A group of four friends decide to play a prank involving the fake kidnapping of one of them and asking for ransom from her father. However, things become complicated when she actually ends up dead.

title: Maharaja
subTitle: Bored by his monotonous lifestyle, Mahadevan, a middle-aged family man, longs to lead a modern life. However, everything begins to fall apart when he chooses to change his way of living.

title: Nazar Ke Samne
subTitle: Jai, an unemployed drunk, gives false testimony that puts an innocent man in jail for murder. However, he later relents and tries to exonerate him by searching for the real killer.

title: Azad Desh Ka Andha Kanoon
subTitle: An honest policemen is forced to choose between duty and family when his brother is caught as part of a gang producing blue-films. He must also protect a witness whose life is threatened.

title: Sultanat
subTitle: Sultan, a brave warrior, tries to win the affections of Yasmin, a beautiful woman. However, his life turns upside down when his father is killed by a general, whom he swears revenge against.

title: Dahej Pratha
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Daraar
subTitle: Raj Malhotra, a wealthy man, falls for Priya. However, things get complicated when Vikram, Priya's abusive husband, enters the frame.

title: Mr. India
subTitle: Hoping to make the world a better place for orphaned children, a compassionate street musician takes on a power-hungry crime boss with the help of a cloaking device.

title: Dhadkan
subTitle: Anjali and Dev's love story faces a harsh twist when Anjali is forced to marry Ram. Years later, Dev returns to rekindle their romance, only to find that Anjali has grown to love her husband.

title: Dhadkan
subTitle: Anjali and Dev's love story faces a harsh twist when Anjali is forced to marry Ram. Years later, Dev returns to rekindle their romance, only to find that Anjali has grown to love her husband.

title: Humjoli
subTitle: A misunderstanding leads to two college friends, Madhu and Sidhu turning bitter towards each other. However, circumstances reunite them for a friend.

title: Star
subTitle: Dev belongs to a middle class family and dreams of becoming a music sensation like his icon Elvis Presley. However, his reality forces him to give up on his dream until he finds a job at Charlie's disco.

title: Haqdaar
subTitle: Bhanu, an illiterate man, hits rock-bottom when his father rejects him and his girlfriend refuses to marry him. Fortunately, his salvation arrives in the form of Swapna, a woman from the city.

title: Kaun Kare Kurbanie
subTitle: Arjun Singh, a police inspector, lives peacefully with his family in Mumbai, until an alarming case of harassment and murder turns his life upside down.

title: Keemat: They Are Back
subTitle: Two crooks accidentally kill a man and decide to inform his parents about the bad news. However, once they meet the family, they end up lying to them.

title: Ek Aur Ek Gyarah
subTitle: Tara and Sitara, siblings and small-time con-men, are on the run from a wanted criminal after they accidentally shoot at him. Soon they end up at the house of major Ram Singh, where they take refuge.

title: Bulandi
subTitle: Dharamraj Thakur, the head of a village, is highly respected by the villagers, However, his dignity is at stake when his younger brother, Arjun, is accused of raping a school teacher.

title: Devta
subTitle: An ordinary taxi driver becomes part of a notorious gang through a twist of fate and takes on the role of a terrifying assassin.

title: Devta
subTitle: An ordinary taxi driver becomes part of a notorious gang through a twist of fate and takes on the role of a terrifying assassin.

title: Ek Aur Bhool Bhulaiyaa
subTitle: Nakulan and his family move into his supposedly haunted ancestral property. However, when his cousin starts behaving uncharacteristically, Nakulan enlists the help of his psychiatrist friend.
